Container.Name: binhex-movarr
Container.Overview: movarr is an automated movie torrent acquisition daemon. It polls Jackett or Prowlarr for movie torrents, filters results against IMDb metadata (rating, votes, year, runtime, language, genres, certification), and adds matching torrents to qBittorrent. Once a torrent completes, movarr can post-process it by copying the file to your media library. All key settings can be defined via the environment variables below, or in the movarr.yml configuration file mounted at /config.
Container.Requires:
Requires a running qBittorrent instance (binhex-qbittorrent recommended). Set MOVARR_QBT_HOST/PORT/USERNAME/PASSWORD to match.
Requires either Jackett or Prowlarr as an index proxy. Set MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY to 'jackett' or 'prowlarr' and fill in the corresponding host, port, and API key variables.
For post-processing (copying completed downloads to a media library), map your library path into this container and set MOVARR_LIBRARY_PATH_LIST to the container path(s).
IMPORTANT - Please ensure you edit /config/movarr/config/movarr.yml after the initial startup.
Container.DonateText: If you appreciate my work, then please consider buying me a beer :D

Config.Name: Path: /config
Config.Description: Container path for movarr configuration file (movarr.yml), database, and logs.

Config.Name: Path: /media
Config.Description: Container path to your media library root. movarr copies completed movies here during post-processing. Set MOVARR_LIBRARY_PATH_LIST to the relevant sub-path(s) inside this mount (e.g. /media/Movies).

Config.Name: Path: /data
Config.Description: Container path to the qBittorrent completed downloads directory. movarr reads source files from here during post-processing before calling qBittorrent to remove the torrent.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_DAEMON
Config.Description: Run movarr as a continuous daemon. Must be 'yes' inside a container — 'no' runs a single pass and exits.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Console log level. Set to DEBUG when troubleshooting. Overrides general.log_level_console in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_LIBRARY_PATH_LIST
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of container paths to your media library. Used to detect already-owned movies and as the post-processing copy destination. Example: /media/Movies,/media/Movies-4K. Overrides general.library_path_list in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_QBT_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP address of the qBittorrent WebUI. If both containers share a Docker network use the container name; for host networking use 'localhost'. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.host in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_QBT_PORT
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI port. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.port in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_QBT_USERNAME
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI username. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.username in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_QBT_PASSWORD
Config.Description: qBittorrent WebUI password. Overrides torrent_client.qbittorrent.password in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY
Config.Description: Index proxy used for torrent searches. Overrides index_proxy.selected in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_JACKETT_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP address of the Jackett instance. Required when MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY=jackett. Overrides index_proxy.jackett.host in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_JACKETT_PORT
Config.Description: Jackett port. Required when MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY=jackett. Overrides index_proxy.jackett.port in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_JACKETT_API_KEY
Config.Description: Jackett API key. Required when MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY=jackett. Overrides index_proxy.jackett.api_key in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_PROWLARR_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP address of the Prowlarr instance. Required when MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY=prowlarr. Overrides index_proxy.prowlarr.host in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_PROWLARR_PORT
Config.Description: Prowlarr port. Required when MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY=prowlarr. Overrides index_proxy.prowlarr.port in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_PROWLARR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Prowlarr API key. Required when MOVARR_INDEX_PROXY=prowlarr. Overrides index_proxy.prowlarr.api_key in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_CONFIG_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the movarr YAML configuration file. Change only if you need the config file in a non-standard location.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_DB_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the movarr SQLite history database. Overrides general.db_path in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_LOG_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the movarr log file. Leave empty to disable file logging. Overrides general.log_path in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: MOVARR_PID_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the movarr PID file. Overrides general.pid_path in movarr.yml.

Config.Name: Variable: ENABLE_STARTUP_SCRIPTS
Config.Description: Specify whether to run startup scripts to install and/or configure additional applications.

Config.Name: Variable: ENABLE_HEALTHCHECK
Config.Description: Enable or disable healthchecks.

Config.Name: Variable: HEALTHCHECK_COMMAND
Config.Description: The command or script to execute for healthchecks; defaults to healthcheck.sh if unset.

Config.Name: Variable: HEALTHCHECK_ACTION
Config.Description: Action to execute on healthcheck failure; defaults to 'exit 1'. Set to 'kill 1' to restart the container on failure.

Config.Name: Variable: HEALTHCHECK_HOSTNAME
Config.Description: Hostname used for DNS and HTTPS healthchecking.

Config.Name: Variable: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for the running container.

Config.Name: Variable: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for the running container.

Config.Name: Variable: UMASK
Config.Description: UMASK for the running container.
